# River Ridge Pet Retreat

> Dog boarding, grooming, and playtime in Dunlap, Tennessee. Family-run by Tess Boring, who has spent a lifetime caring for dogs. Serves the Sequatchie Valley — Dunlap, Pikeville, Whitwell, Jasper, and surrounding areas.

## Location & contact
- Address: 1315 River Ridge Rd, Dunlap, TN 37327
- Phone: [PHONE NUMBER]
- Owner: Tess Boring

## Services
- **Boarding** — indoor/outdoor kennel runs, with reduced rates for dogs from the same household sharing a run
- **Grooming** — bath, de-shedding treatment, nail trimming
- **Playtime add-on** — dedicated one-on-one play sessions with a caretaker during a boarding stay

## Pages
- [Home](https://riverridgepetretreat.com/) — services overview, FAQ, testimonials
- [About Tess](https://riverridgepetretreat.com/about/) — owner bio
- [Boarding](https://riverridgepetretreat.com/services/boarding/) — boarding details, what to bring, FAQs
- [Grooming](https://riverridgepetretreat.com/services/grooming/) — grooming services, scheduling, FAQs
- [Contact](https://riverridgepetretreat.com/contact/) — booking inquiry form, phone, address, directions
